title: aspidium regium
intro: Aspidium regium, also known as the Royal Male Fern, is a type of flowering plant native to Asia, which belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family of ferns. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating kidney and urinary tract problems, due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Aspidium regium include relieving symptoms of kidney stones, cystitis, and other urinary issues, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of Aspidium regium typically involve drying and processing the plant's fronds and rhizomes to create teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
